name: Shrinkerr
author: Shrinkerr
about: Compress media files via Shrinkerr before Sonarr imports them. Only processes shows tagged in Sonarr.
description: After NZBGet completes a download, this extension checks Sonarr for a matching tag.
If the tag matches, it sends the file to Shrinkerr for HEVC conversion.
The compressed file is then picked up by Sonarr for import.
Requires: Shrinkerr running and accessible, Sonarr API access.

options.name: ShrinkerrApiKey
description: API key for Shrinkerr (leave empty if no auth)

options.name: TagName
description: Only process shows with this tag in Sonarr. Case-insensitive.

options.name: Categories
description: Comma-separated NZBGet categories to process (e.g. TV,Movies). Empty = all.

options.name: WaitForCompletion
description: Yes: Script waits until Shrinkerr finishes converting (blocks Sonarr import until done).
No: Script queues the file and exits immediately (Sonarr may import before conversion).

commands.name: ConnectionTest
description: Tests connection to Shrinkerr and Sonarr
